---
title: "Margins — BHB Dashboard"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin: 2rem 0;">
  <a href="corpus/" style="text-decoration: none; color: inherit;">
    <div class="scope-stat" style="border-left-color: #0e7490;">
      <div class="label">Dashboard</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0.3rem 0;">The Corpus</div>
      <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #6b7280;">10,787 records · 1470–1800 · charts &amp; distributions</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a href="desiderata/" style="text-decoration: none; color: inherit;">
    <div class="scope-stat" style="border-left-color: #7c2d12;">
      <div class="label">Desiderata</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0.3rem 0;">Notes → ontology</div>
      <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #6b7280;">Coverage matrix · worked LRMoo example</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a href="methods/bibliographic_units_and_marc.html" style="text-decoration: none; color: inherit;">
    <div class="scope-stat" style="border-left-color: #6b7280;">
      <div class="label">Methods</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0.3rem 0;">Documentation</div>
      <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #6b7280;">FRBR · MARC · Bowers · Hebrew terminology</div>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<p style="text-align: center; color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 2rem;">
  Built on the <a href="https://datastudio.google.com/u/0/reporting/73a17dcc-f092-4dec-8c57-58b606862b2d/page/FPCXD">DiJeSt project</a> · BHB data · <a href="https://kima.openmaps.online/">KIMA</a> gazetteer
</p>
```
